content.en:
"It's a little tricky!"

Ye Tian slowly retreated.

His Eternal Blood Bird Replica Body is only four bone transformation realms, and in the Eternal Blood Bird Clan, it is a small transparent, not worth mentioning at all.

Compared to the Eternal Blood Bird of the Seventh-Time Bone Transformation Realm, his replica body was too weak.

If you dare to disobey the other party's orders, you may be killed.

......

"With this Seventh-Time Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Blood Bird guarding this ancient well on the other side, I can't get close, I have to lure it away!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He thought about it carefully, and it seemed that only his true body copied his body.

His true god copy body is a top primeval-level genius in the four-time bone transformation realm, and he can use a top-notch ancient technique, and his combat power is between the sixth-time bone transformation realm and the seventh-time bone transformation realm, although he can't beat this seventh-time bone transformation realm's eternal blood bird, but the other eternal blood birds are not his opponents.

The opponent must take action himself to kill him.

And.

If he kills a group of Eternal Blood Birds and wants to escape, the other party will inevitably hunt him down.

By the time the other party killed his true body and copied his body, he would have already taken the golden water from the other side.

"Let's go according to this plan!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, if you try, even if you do fail, it doesn't matter.

Subsequently.

A true copy of Ye Tian's body came here, and then began to shoot.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian made a full effort, casting the Ancient God and Demon Spear, piercing the Eternal Blood Birds one by one.

In a breath, one by one, the Eternal Blood Birds were killed.

Followed by.

He also unleashed a top-notch primeval technique on a large scale—the primeval dark tides!

This kind of top-notch primeval technique, a single attack is indeed inferior to the primeval god and demon spear, but the lethality of a group attack is terrifying.

In an instant.

A dark tide surged towards a large number of Eternal Blood Birds here, and some of the Eternal Blood Birds were directly crushed by the dark tide, and none of them escaped.

Abrupt.

The Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Bone Transformation Realms appeared, its wings spread, and endless flames shattered the dark tides.

Immediately after, it turned into a ray of light and killed Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian had already fled immediately after casting the dark tide.

He continued to use the Ancient Realm Technique, and he was about to escape.

He knew that he would be overtaken, because his speed was no match for the Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm, and he still had a large number of Eternal Blood Bird marks on his body, so he naturally couldn't hide.

However, the purpose of his true body replicating body was to lure away the Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Bone Transformation Realms.

......

"Hahaha, that Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm has finally been lured away!"

Ye Tian rushed to the ancient well on the other side as soon as possible.

And the other Eternal Blood Birds here have long been stunned by this sudden attack, how can they have time to pay attention to the ancient well on the other side!

They were even afraid that the Bone Transformation Realm powerhouse would attack again, so they hid inside their nests one by one, and even joined forces to prevent accidents from happening.

Of course.

There were also Eternal Blood Birds who were scared and flew away directly.

Therefore, Ye Tian's Eternal Blood Bird copied the body and easily entered the interior of the ancient well on the other side.

"I have limited time, I must hurry up and take the gold water from the other side!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After he entered the ancient well on the other side, he sensed that there was indeed a lot of gold water on the other side.

"The Eternal Blood Bird Clan is really not too important to the Golden Water on the other side, and it is not that it is not taken seriously, but at least it is not valued by other Blood Transformation Realm races and cultivators. If you attach great importance to it, you will have to take away these golden waters from the other side as soon as possible and hide them!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, these Jinshui on the other side are surnamed Ye.

"Take them all!"

Ye Tian directly swallowed the golden water on the other side and stored it in the void inside the abdomen of this Eternal Blood Bird's replica body.

As a little bit of the gold water on the other side broke away from this ancient well on the other side, gradually, all the gold water on the other side of the bank was taken away.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian quickly flew out of the ancient well on the other side, and then left here without looking back.

He doesn't want to be searched, and then he can't keep the gold on the other side of his body!

And he is now an Eternal Blood Bird, and the other Eternal Blood Birds will naturally not intercept him and let him leave.

He kept flying and shuttling, getting farther and farther away from here.

The other side.

Ye Tian was caught up by the Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm, and a big battle broke out, but he was finally killed.

Subsequently.

This Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm returned very proudly.

It returned to the ancient well on the other side, sensed a little problem, and then entered the inside of the ancient well on the other side.

But when it found that all the gold water on the other side was gone, it was furious.

Thereupon.

It began to search for the golden water on the other side, and even called the eternal blood birds here one by one to ask.

Eventually, it learns that an Eternal Blood Bird appears to be approaching this side, but that the Eternal Blood Bird is missing.

In this regard, it has no choice but to send the information of the Eternal Blood Bird back to the clan headquarters, and if it finds the Eternal Blood Bird, immediately capture it.

In other words, Ye Tian, the Eternal Blood Bird Replicating Body, is wanted.

But he didn't care anymore, because he would soon give up this replica body.

......

Ye Tian's Eternal Blood Bird Replica Body met with another True Body Replica Body, and handed over those golden waters from the other side.

Then, the Eternal Blood Bird replicated its body and annihilated itself.

In this way, even if the Eternal Blood Bird Clan pursues and kills, it will not be able to chase and kill.

"We have to return to the Eternal Ancient Demon City!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After some time, he returned to the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

Next, he was ready to do penance for a while.

"This time, I have obtained a lot of gold water from the other side, which is equivalent to more than three hundred and ten bottles of gold water from the other side, and in terms of value, it is equivalent to more than 30 million primary eternal ancient gold!" Ye Tian calculated.

So much gold water on the other side is equivalent to more than a dozen Canghe pearls.

With so much wealth so easily, it has to be said that plunder is the fastest way to grow wealth.

It's just that this process is very dangerous, even if it's the seventh bone transformation realm in the land of eternity, don't dare to do this, otherwise it will be very troublesome to be targeted by the Eternal Blood Bird Clan!

Like the Eternal Ancient Demon City, they would not accept the bone transformation realm that was marked by the Eternal Blood Bird.

Therefore, once targeted by the Eternal Blood Bird, unless you escape into some special areas, or use some treasures to forcibly cover the aura of the imprint, there is no way to get rid of the Eternal Blood Bird Clan.

Therefore, the other bone transformation realms did not dare to fight the idea of the ancient well on the other side of the Eternal Blood Bird at all.

Ye Tian is not afraid of falling and copying his body, and he also has the ability to copy his body, so he succeeded!

It can be said that he cannot replicate this situation, and he can do it.
